rows.notes: Adopted from gemini-flash (row 1) as gpt-5-mini missed this clear header. Visually verified text and row type. It clearly labels the shillings and pence columns.

rows.description: Mem° lost by The Death of Mrs Hawes
rows.notes: Amount fields were agreed by both extractors (blank). Description adopted from gemini-flash (row 2) for 'Mem°' (reflecting superscript 'o') and correct capitalization ('The Death', 'Mrs Hawes'), which was visually verified over gpt-5-mini's 'Memd' and lowercase transcription (gpt-5-mini row 1). gpt-5-mini's note acknowledging abbreviation was insightful but gemini-flash's transcription was more accurate.
rows.english_description: Memorandum noting a loss occasioned by the death of Mrs Hawes.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Memorandum noting a loss occasioned by the death of Mrs Hawes; amount not recorded.

rows.description: 30 Due for Guinear at a Day 1727
rows.notes: Amount fields were agreed by both extractors (blank). Description adopted from gemini-flash (row 3), as 'Guinear' (not 'Guineas') and '1727' (not '1707') were visually verified over gpt-5-mini's transcription (gpt-5-mini row 2). The capitalization of 'Due' and 'Day' also aligns with the image. Both extractors provided good notes regarding fading and the '30' being an item number, not an amount.
rows.english_description: Entry noting 30 due in respect of a guinea at a day dated 1727.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Entry noting 30 due in respect of a guinea at a day dated 1727, amounting to 30 (units not specified).

rows.description: Lost by The Death of Mr. Betty
rows.notes: Description text 'Lost by The Death of Mr. Betty' with correct capitalization adopted from gemini-flash (row 4). The amount '16/-' is clearly embedded directly after the description text on the page, correctly identified by gemini-flash as 16 shillings and 0 pence. gpt-5-mini (row 3) missed this embedded amount, noting only a 'small faint number to the left' which was incorrect in location and interpretation.
rows.english_description: Loss recorded resulting from the death of Mr Betty.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Loss recorded resulting from the death of Mr Betty, amounting to £0 16s 0d.
